subcodes.title: Words to pilgrims, spoken on 1914-06-29
subcodes.first_line: Ishkabad is now a good center. In the past, Merv was the center
subcodes.first_line_orig: عشق اباد محال خوب مرکزی است مرو در زمان قدیم مرکز خراسان بود
subcodes.subjects: @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @education of children; moral education, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @growth of the Cause
